subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from the One who is Remembered be unto him who hath turned towards the Manifestation when the Call was raised from the Mount: "Verily, there is none other God but I." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المذکور الی الذی اقبل الی الظهور اذ ارتفع الندآء من الطور انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
